title: IoT Fundamentals & Applications
description: A comprehensive workshop exploring IoT architecture, sensors, connectivity, and real-world applications across industries.

title: PCB Designing
description: Make Your First PCB with Us! Hands-on workshop on PCB design and fabrication, guiding participants through the process of creating their own printed circuit boards for electronics projects.

title: 15 Days Project-Based Internship
